detectors.description:
Reentrancy in SmartContract._transfer(address,address,uint256) (SmartContract.sol#709-833):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (SmartContract.sol#773)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (SmartContract.sol#847-859)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (SmartContract.sol#779)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (SmartContract.sol#867)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (SmartContract.sol#869)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (SmartContract.sol#831)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (SmartContract.sol#999)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (SmartContract.sol#979)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (SmartContract.sol#981)
	SmartContract._rOwned (SmartContract.sol#347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SmartContract._takeTeam(uint256) (SmartContract.sol#993-1001)
	- SmartContract._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (SmartContract.sol#953-989)
	- SmartContract.balanceOf(address) (SmartContract.sol#535-539)
	- SmartContract.constructor() (SmartContract.sol#443-499)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (SmartContract.sol#831)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (SmartContract.sol#1007)
	SmartContract._rTotal (SmartContract.sol#359) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SmartContract._getCurrentSupply() (SmartContract.sol#1157-1169)
	- SmartContract._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (SmartContract.sol#1005-1011)
	- SmartContract.constructor() (SmartContract.sol#443-499)
	- SmartContract.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (SmartContract.sol#631-653)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [SmartContract._transfer(address,address,uint256)](SmartContract.sol#L709-L833):
	External calls:

		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](SmartContract.sol#L847-L859)

		- [_developmentAddress.transfer(amount.div(2))](SmartContract.sol#L867)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount.div(2))](SmartContract.sol#L869)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](SmartContract.sol#L831)
		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](SmartContract.sol#L999)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](SmartContract.sol#L979)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](SmartContract.sol#L981)
	[SmartContract._rOwned](SmartContract.sol#L347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [SmartContract._takeTeam(uint256)](SmartContract.sol#L993-L1001)
	- [SmartContract._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](SmartContract.sol#L953-L989)
	- [SmartContract.balanceOf(address)](SmartContract.sol#L535-L539)
	- [SmartContract.constructor()](SmartContract.sol#L443-L499)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](SmartContract.sol#L831)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](SmartContract.sol#L1007)
	[SmartContract._rTotal](SmartContract.sol#L359) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [SmartContract._getCurrentSupply()](SmartContract.sol#L1157-L1169)
	- [SmartContract._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](SmartContract.sol#L1005-L1011)
	- [SmartContract.constructor()](SmartContract.sol#L443-L499)
	- [SmartContract.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](SmartContract.sol#L631-L653)

	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (SmartContract.sol#831)
		- _tFeeTotal = _tFeeTotal.add(tFee) (SmartContract.sol#1009)
	- _taxFee = _taxFeeOnBuy (SmartContract.sol#809)
	- _taxFee = _taxFeeOnSell (SmartContract.sol#821)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (SmartContract.sol#831)
		- _taxFee = _previoustaxFee (SmartContract.sol#681)
		- _taxFee = 0 (SmartContract.sol#671)
